brightness.help: Overall brightness of the wallpaper palette

temperature.help: Shift the palette between cooler and warmer tones

tint.help: Shift the palette between green and magenta

edgeBrightness.help: Structural-line brightness for Breathing Membrane and Tide Archive; remembered on other presets

triangleVisibility.help: Folded-surface opacity for Wandering Ink and Breathing Membrane; remembered on other presets

nodeCount.help: More nodes produce more triangular faces; changing this rebuilds the mesh

pressureStrength.help: Breathing deformation for Crumpled Paper, Breathing Membrane, and Tide Archive; remembered on Ink

pressureRadius.help: Pressure-field size for Crumpled Paper, Breathing Membrane, and Tide Archive; remembered on Ink

memoryStrength.help: Structural memory for Wandering Ink, Breathing Membrane, and Tide Archive; remembered on Paper

motionSpeed.help: Ambient pressure speed for Crumpled Paper, Breathing Membrane, and Tide Archive; remembered on Ink

mouseStrength.help: Hover and drag deformation for Crumpled Paper and Tide Archive; remembered on other presets
